industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: Orient Green Power Company Limited
summary: Orient Green Power Company Limited, an independent renewable energy power producing company, develops, owns, and operates a portfolio of wind energy power plants in India. It has a portfolio of 421 MW of wind energy across Tamil Nadu, Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat, and Karnataka, as well as 10.5 MW wind power plant in Croatia. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Chennai, India.
